task: Move the green pot to the right, open the microwave door, place the green pot in the microwave then close the microwave door
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS -** A green pot with a handle sits on a wooden table. A red microwave is to the left of the table. The microwave door is closed. The green pot is rigid with a handle; the microwave door is a flat surface with a latch. STRATEGY - First, grasp the pot's handle to lift it. Then, transport it to the microwave's interior. Next, open the microwave door to access the interior. Place the pot inside the microwave. Finally, close the microwave door. Failure modes include dropping the pot, failing to open/close the door, or misplacing the pot. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1: reach the pot at its body; Step 2: grasp the handle for secure hold; Step 3: transport to the microwave; Step 4: pull the door latch to open; Step 5: place the pot inside; Step 6: push the door to close.

Goal: inside(green_pot, microwave); closed(microwave_door)
Scene: green_pot, microwave, table
Step 1: reach(green_pot)
  affordance_region: the body of the green pot
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, green_pot, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, green_pot) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(green_pot)
  affordance_region: the handle of the green pot
  contact: holding(green_pot) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(green_pot)
Step 3: transport(green_pot -> microwave)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the microwave
  spatial: inside(green_pot, microwave, <, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(green_pot)
  done_when: inside(green_pot, microwave, <, 0.05)
Step 4: pull(microwave_door_latch)
  affordance_region: the latch on the microwave door
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, microwave_door_latch, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, microwave_door_latch) < 0.03
Step 5: place(green_pot -> microwave)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the microwave
  contact: surface_contact(green_pot, microwave_interior) [completion]; released(green_pot) [completion]
  pose: stable(green_pot) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(green_pot, microwave_interior) AND released(green_pot)
Step 6: push(microwave_door)
  affordance_region: the edge of the microwave door
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, microwave_door, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, microwave_door) < 0.03
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the green pot
the handle of the green pot
an empty area inside the microwave
the latch on the microwave door
an empty area inside the microwave
the edge of the microwave door
